arts.ttl: Rangers vs Fenerbahce – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers are within reach of the Europa League quarter-finals ahead of facing Fenerbahce in the second leg of their last-16 tie. The Scottish side upset the odds to claim a 3-1 win in Istanbul, with Barry Ferguson’s side boasting a two-goal advantage to protect at Ibrox. arts.ttl: Issame Charaï on what Rangers are doing to compete with Celtic in transfer market – Strategy paying off
arts.sum: Rangers will host Fenerbahçe in the Europa League on Thursday before facing Celtic at the weekend. Barry Ferguson’s side have an advantage against the Turkish club after they secured a 3-1 win in the first leg in Istanbul. They are looking to secure results over both Fenerbahçe and Celtic in the next few days.
